articles.title: U.S. Stock Market Resilience Faces Economic and Geo-Political Tests
articles.description: The U.S. stock market, despite approaching record highs, is posed with significant tests from upcoming economic data, earnings reports, and geopolitical developments, especially related to tensions with Iran. With the Federal Reserve considering rate hikes amidst fluctuating oil prices and strong corporate earnings, strategic investment decisions face pressure.

articles.title: Struggling consumers urge cut in fuel excise tax
articles.description: Consumer groups have called for cuts to fuel excise taxes, arguing that recent retail price reductions fail to address the structural causes of high oil prices.

articles.title: Geopolitical Situation, Earnings, Crude Prices Key Factors to Drive Markets: Analysts
articles.description: Domestic equity markets are expected to take cues from the US-Iran geopolitical conflict, crude oil prices and the ongoing Q1 FY27 earnings season this week. Investors will also monitor June CPI and WPI inflation data, monsoon progress and foreign investor activity for signs of economic and market trends. Earnings from companies including HCL Technologies, Tech Mahindra, Union Bank and Federal Bank will be closely watched for management commentary. Global attention will remain on US inflation data and its potential impact on Federal Reserve policy expectations and broader market sentiment.

articles.title: 'Mileage has gone from 17 to 5': Sourav Joshi claims ethanol blended petrol is hurting his Mercedes
articles.description: After pointing to the dashboard, Joshi blamed the fuel being sold at petrol stations.

articles.title: I helped drive this record-setting EV across Britain on sunshine alone - and the 870-mile trip cost absolutely nothing
articles.description: No grid, no petrol, just free sunshine

articles.title: E20 controversy explained: Why an old roadmap is back in spotlight
articles.description: India Business News: The Centre's push for mandatory 20% ethanol-blended petrol, or E20, has triggered a political row, with Opposition leaders citing a 2021 NITI Aayog re.

articles.title: Kia Syros EV Leaked - New Electric SUV Spied Undisguised Ahead of India Launch
articles.description: The Kia Syros EV has been seen in Bangalore, revealing its design ahead of its expected launch on July 23. This sub-compact electric SUV retains much of its petrol counterpart's styling, including the headlamp cluster and body cladding, while featuring new 17-inch wheels., Electric Vehicles, Times Now
